data.title: Fellaz launches decentralized entertainment protocol stack: win $3,000 for beta access + over 2,000 USDT. Aims to disrupt traditional industry.
data.description: On July 4, 2025, Singapore-based web3 entertainment protocol Fellaz announced the release of its decentralized entertainment stack comprised of three main protocols: Fellaz ID, Fellaz RWA, and Fellaz Creator. This launch is part of an effort to revolutionize the entertainment sector by leveraging decentralized technologies.

data.title: AI adoption in digital payments & e-commerce booming. Generative AI market to hit USD 425B by 2030. 1/3 companies to invest over USD 25M in AI by 2025.
data.description: A recent report titled "AI Transformation 2025- Global Adoption, Innovation, and Impact in Digital Payments and E-Commerce" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report highlights the ongoing growth in global spending on AI technologies, with the generative AI market forecasted to hit USD 425 billion by 2030. Moreover, by 2025, approximately one-third of companies are anticipated to invest more than USD 25 million in AI projects. This trend is notably prominent in key markets like Japan, Singapore, and others.

data.title: Cloud Computing Market set to grow from $1,294.9 billion in 2025 to $2,281.1 billion by 2030 at a 12.0% CAGR.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on July 4, 2025, it was reported that the Cloud Computing Market is projected to experience a substantial growth, rising from USD 1,294.9 billion in 2025 to USD 2,281.1 billion by 2030. This increase represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 12.0% over the forecast period. The data comes from a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™.

data.title: CDU market set to rise due to AI and HPC driving cooling demand. Global analysis predicts growth in CDU market through 2024-2031.
data.description: The global market for Coolant Distribution Units (CDU) for Data Centers is categorized by type into Liquid-to-Liquid CDU and Liquid-to-Air CDU. It is further segmented by application into Internet, Telecommunications, Finance, Government, and Other sectors. The industry forecast covers the period of 2024-2031. The report originates from Bangalore, India and was released on July 4, 2025.

data.title: Gundam GQuuuuuuX wows thousands at Anime Expo 2025 in LA with groundbreaking showcase.
data.description: An electrifying celebration of a new era in Gundam history took place in Los Angeles, on July 4, 2025. Mobile Suit Gundam GQuuuuuuX stole the show at Anime Expo 2025, captivating thousands of passionate fans at the Peacock Theater. The event marked a groundbreaking moment, with Gundam Rising sparking excitement and anticipation among the attendees.

data.title: COSRX launches #GlossyHairStrands TikTok Challenge to promote Peptide-132 haircare line.
data.description: On July 4, 2025, in New York City, COSRX, a renowned skincare brand known for popular beauty trends on TikTok, is gaining attention once more. This time, they are entering the haircare market with the introduction of the Peptide-132 Damage Repair Haircare Collection. The launch of this collection has caused a stir among consumers, and COSRX is engaging users from various platforms to join in the celebration.

data.title: Smart City Expo 2025 in Barcelona is set to be the largest edition with event taking place from November 4-6.
data.description: In Barcelona, Spain, the Smart City Expo World Congress (SCEWC), the top global event focusing on cities and smart urban solutions hosted by Fira de Barcelona, is gearing up for its biggest edition yet in 2025. Set to take place from November 4-6, the event will revolve around the theme "The Time for Cities."

data.title: Article discusses floriography, coded flower communication in Victorian Era (1837-1901). Language of flowers conveyed emotions & messages.
data.description: On July 4, 2025 in Los Angeles, it was discussed that floriography is the act of secretly communicating using flowers during the Victorian Era that spanned from 1837 to 1901. The practice involved using flowers to convey emotions such as love, longing, or rejection discreetly in society. This form of encrypted communication was widely used during that historical period, enabling individuals to express their feelings through the beauty of blooms without explicitly stating them.

data.title: U.S. jewelry market to reach USD 97.62 billion by 2030, growing at CAGR of 3.72% from USD 78.40 billion in 2024.
data.description: A report titled "U.S. Jewelry Market - Focused Insights 2025-2030" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. In 2024, the U.S. Jewelry Market had a value of USD 78.40 billion, and it is estimated to increase to USD 97.62 billion by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 3.72%. The growth in the U.S. jewelry market can be attributed to the increasing demand for wedding and engagement jewelry, along with a surge in interest from millennial and Gen Z consumers. Notably, in 2024, the segment dominated by rings yielded the highest revenue.
